title: Echoes of Eidolon Locale Image Sidecar
description: Flat intended-metadata sidecar that lives next to one concept-art image in /locales/images. This file records the generator/app intent for camera, view, anchors, prompt lineage, and consumption notes. The sidecar is authority for intended anchors; image parsing records observed deviations separately.

cityCode.description: Three-letter city code, such as AQM, LUM, or NVR.

viewCode.description: Camera/view code without the city code or version, e.g. HERO-NW.

version.description: Integer version number used in the vNNN basename suffix.

metadataPath.description: Same-basename JSON sidecar path for the image.

promptRecordKey.description: Stable prompt record key without version suffix, e.g. AQM-HERO-NW.

viewType.description: Intended view type, e.g. hero, street, district, landmark, approach, interior, cutaway.

oppositeSide.description: Opposite city side from the camera origin.

visibleSections.description: City sections intended to be visible in this image.

key.description: Semantic anchor key, e.g. seatOfPower, beacon, wonder, secondaryMajorLandmark.

type.description: Anchor asset type, e.g. CITADEL, MAJOR_LANDMARK, WONDER.

sectionNumber.description: Section number when the anchor is tied to a specific city section.

canonicalAnchors.description: Intended canonical anchors. Do not overwrite these based on image interpretation.

consumptionNotes.description: Instructions for the parser consuming the matching image and sidecar.
